Notes: Hope Bonlander led all players with 13 points...U-Mary has now won eight
consecutive games...the Marauders were led by Kaitlyn Haag who finished with
12 points...SMSU hosts Northern State at 6 p.m. tomorrow night.
Game.Officials: Brad Sylliaasen,  Mike Gullingsrud,  Elisha Hoye
